entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `total_sets` INTEGER NOT NULL, `reps` INTEGER NOT NULL, `rest_seconds` INTEGER NOT NULL, `weight_kg` REAL, `created_at_epoch_millis` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_at_epoch_millis` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_routines_name
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_routines_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`name`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `name` TEXT NOT NULL, `normalized_name` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_routine_classifications_normalized_name
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_routine_classifications_normalized_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`normalized_name`)

indices.name: index_routine_classifications_name
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_routine_classifications_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`name`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`routine_id` TEXT NOT NULL, `classification_id` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`routine_id`, `classification_id`), FOREIGN KEY(`routine_id`) REFERENCES `routines`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE , FOREIGN KEY(`classification_id`) REFERENCES `routine_classifications`(`id`) ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE CASCADE )

indices.name: index_routine_classification_cross_refs_routine_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_routine_classification_cross_refs_routine_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`routine_id`)

indices.name: index_routine_classification_cross_refs_classification_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_routine_classification_cross_refs_classification_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`classification_id`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `completed_at_epoch_millis` INTEGER NOT NULL, `routine_id` TEXT, `routine_name_snapshot` TEXT NOT NULL, `classification_id` TEXT, `classification_name_snapshot` TEXT, `duration_seconds` INTEGER, `notes` TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_workout_completions_completed_at_epoch_millis
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_workout_completions_completed_at_epoch_millis` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`completed_at_epoch_millis`)

indices.name: index_workout_completions_routine_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_workout_completions_routine_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`routine_id`)

indices.name: index_workout_completions_classification_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_workout_completions_classification_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`classification_id`)
